Azure 2 lab seems in bad shape.
We are currently running all the gating on the 2 azure labs
we had hardware crash (ddisk) beginning of August preventing the use of orange chains.
the compute node has just been restarted today, I will reinstall Orange gates and reenable these chains.
I will also reinstall azure 2 
we do nto have results, because we do not have installation..cleaning of the namespace is failing (https://gitlab.com/Orange-OpenSource/lfn/onap/onap_oom_automatic_installation/-/jobs/683232245)
I will deactivate also Azure 2 and rerun a gating on the only one lab available
